title: tulipa boeotica subsp. euanthiae
intro: Tulipa boeotica subsp. euanthiae, also known as the 'Tulipa boeotica subsp. euanthiae', is a rare and unique subspecies of the Boeotian tulip, a type of wild tulip. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Tulipa boeotica subsp. euanthiae include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe and clear the airways, making it easier to breathe. Herbal preparations of Tulipa boeotica subsp. euanthiae can be made by infusing the flowers or roots in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
